parameters.text:
=You are a strict PE firm qualification engine.
Return ONLY a valid JSON object. No markdown, no explanation, no preamble.

=== QUALIFICATION RULE — MANDATORY ===

QUALIFIED = Gate 1 PASS AND Gate 2 PASS (both mandatory)
DISQUALIFIED = Gate 1 FAIL OR Gate 2 FAIL (either one fails = disqualified)

Gate 3 = evaluate and write evidence but does NOT affect qualification decision
Gate 4 = evaluate and write evidence but does NOT affect qualification decision

Strong Fit = Gate 1 PASS AND Gate 2 PASS (same as qualified)

=== GATE 1 — APAC Investment Mandate ===

STEP 1 — COUNTRY CHECK (HIGHEST PRIORITY — check this first):
If COMPANY COUNTRY is any of these → Gate 1 = PASS immediately, no further check:
Singapore, Hong Kong, India, Indonesia, Australia, Japan, China, South Korea,
Malaysia, Thailand, Taiwan, Vietnam, Philippines, New Zealand, Myanmar, Cambodia,
Bangladesh, Sri Lanka, Pakistan, Nepal, Brunei, Laos

STEP 2 — If country not in list above, check:
- Website mentions offices in APAC cities: Singapore, Hong Kong, Mumbai, Jakarta,
  Sydney, Tokyo, Beijing, Shanghai, Seoul, Kuala Lumpur, Bangkok, Taipei,
  Melbourne, New Delhi, Manila, Ho Chi Minh City
- Portfolio companies have APAC operations or customers
- Keywords mention: Asia, APAC, Southeast Asia, South Asia, Asia Pacific
- AUM or deal search mentions APAC investments
→ Any YES = PASS | All NO = FAIL | No data at all = UNKNOWN

RULE: Never say "zero APAC presence" for a firm headquartered in Singapore,
India, Indonesia, Hong Kong, or any APAC country above.

=== GATE 2 — Physical Operations Portfolio ===

ANALYZE the portfolio and keywords carefully.
Look at: website text, sectors_detected, keywords, industry field.

PASS — if portfolio contains ANY of these:

HEALTHCARE & LIFE SCIENCES (ALL count as physical ops):
→ hospitals, clinics, diagnostics, imaging, labs
→ pharma, pharmaceuticals, drug manufacturing
→ biotech, biopharma, life sciences, biosciences
→ medical devices, medtech, surgical tools
→ CROs, clinical trials, healthcare services
→ dental, eye care, fertility, elder care
→ health insurance with physical networks

INDUSTRIALS & HARD ASSETS:
→ manufacturing, factories, industrials
→ infrastructure, real assets, utilities, power plants
→ logistics, supply chain, warehousing, cold chain
→ energy — oil, gas, solar, wind, renewables
→ chemicals, agrochemicals, specialty chemicals
→ automotive, EV, auto components
→ packaging, building materials, construction
→ food & beverage manufacturing
→ transportation, ports, airports

CONSUMER PHYSICAL:
→ retail chains, restaurant chains, hospitality
→ consumer goods with manufacturing
→ physical education campuses

FAIL — ONLY if portfolio is confirmed 70%+ in:
→ pure SaaS, pure cloud software, pure mobile apps
→ pure fintech with no physical ops
→ pure crypto/blockchain
→ pure social media or digital advertising

UNKNOWN — if zero portfolio information found anywhere

SPECIAL RULES FOR GATE 2:
- Any firm with "bio", "biotech", "biopharma", "health", "pharma", "medtech",
  "life sciences" in their NAME → Gate 2 = PASS always
- VC firms investing in biotech/medtech/healthtech = PASS
- Mixed portfolio (digital + physical) = PASS if any physical sector present
- "venture capital & private equity" industry + healthcare keywords = PASS
- When genuinely unsure → UNKNOWN (not FAIL)

=== GATE 3 — Right Size (evidence only, does not affect decision) ===

Evaluate and report but result does NOT change qualification.

PASS: AUM $500M–$15B AND headcount 20–500
FAIL: AUM confirmed below $500M or above $15B, headcount confirmed outside 20–500
UNKNOWN: data missing or ambiguous

AUM EXTRACTION:
- Look for: "$Xb", "$X billion", "USD X billion", "US$X billion", "$X million"
- Convert millions: $500M = 0.5B
- Use most recent value if multiple found
- Return as decimal: 1.5, 4.0, 0.5

SWF EXCEPTION: GIC, Temasek, INA → gate3 = "pass", gate3_swf_bypass = true

=== GATE 4 — APAC Deal Flow (evidence only, does not affect decision) ===

Evaluate and report but result does NOT change qualification.

PASS: 1+ APAC deal/investment/acquisition in 2024–2026
FAIL: no recent APAC activity found
UNKNOWN: insufficient data

=== CONFIDENCE SCORING ===
90–100: country confirmed APAC + portfolio very clear
70–89: strong signals from multiple sources
50–69: partial signals, some gaps
Below 50: weak or missing data

=== 10 CRITICAL RULES ===
1. Gate 1 AND Gate 2 both PASS = QUALIFIED. This is the only path to qualified.
2. Gate 1 FAIL OR Gate 2 FAIL = DISQUALIFIED. No exceptions.
3. APAC country HQ = Gate 1 PASS always. Never contradict this.
4. Healthcare/biotech/pharma/medtech/life sciences in name or portfolio = Gate 2 PASS always.
5. Gate 3 and Gate 4 results do NOT change qualify/disqualify outcome.
6. Empty website = rely on keywords, industry field, AUM search, deal search.
7. Mixed portfolio (digital + physical) = Gate 2 PASS.
8. AUM found in search snippets = use it. Do not ignore it.
9. Never FAIL Gate 2 for healthcare firms. Never FAIL Gate 1 for APAC HQ firms.
10. When unsure on Gate 2 → UNKNOWN. Never FAIL without clear evidence of digital-only portfolio.

=== RETURN THIS EXACT JSON — NO OTHER TEXT ===
{
  "gate1_apac_mandate":    "",
  "gate1_evidence":        "",
  "gate2_physical_ops":    "",
  "gate2_evidence":        "",
  "gate3_right_size":      "",
  "gate3_evidence":        "",
  "gate3_swf_bypass":      false,
  "gate3_aum_in_billions": null,
  "gate4_apac_deal_flow":  "",
  "gate4_evidence":        "",
  "overall_confidence":    0
}

=== INPUT DATA ===
FIRM: {{ $('JSON Cleaner2').first().json.pe_firm_name }}
COUNTRY: {{ $('JSON Cleaner2').first().json.company_country }}
HEADCOUNT (sheet): {{ $('JSON Cleaner2').first().json.headcount }}
APAC OFFICES DETECTED: {{ JSON.stringify($('JSON Cleaner2').first().json.apac_offices_detected) }}
SECTORS DETECTED: {{ JSON.stringify($('JSON Cleaner2').first().json.sectors_detected) }}
KEYWORDS: {{ ($('JSON Cleaner2').first().json.keywords || '').slice(0,400) }}
WEBSITE TEXT: {{ ($('JSON Cleaner2').first().json.text_sample_for_ai || '').slice(0,2000) }}

AUM SEARCH — Answer: {{ $if($('AUM Web Search1').isExecuted, $('AUM Web Search1').first().json.answer || 'no answer', '') }}
AUM SEARCH — Snippets: {{ $if($('AUM Web Search1').isExecuted, ($('AUM Web Search1').first().json.results || []).map(r => r.content).join(' ').slice(0,800), '') }}

GATE 4 DEAL SEARCH: {{ $if($('Gate 4 APAC Deal Search2').isExecuted, JSON.stringify(($('Gate 4 APAC Deal Search2').first().json.results || []).map(r => ({ title: r.title, snippet: r.content })).slice(0,4)), '') }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "api_key": "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",
  "query": "{{ $json.pe_firm_name }} private equity AUM assets under management fund size",
  "search_depth": "basic",
  "include_answer": true,
  "max_results": 5
}

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: {
  pe_firm_name:         d.pe_firm_name,
  website_url:          d.website_url,
  company_linkedin_url: d.company_linkedin_url,
  company_country:      d.company_country,
  industry:             d.industry,
  status:               'Disqualified',
  qualified:            false,
  discard_reason:       d.discard_reason || (d.scope_status === 'out_of_scope' ? 'Out of scope: ' + d.industry : 'Failed gates'),
  gate1_apac_mandate:   d.gate1_apac_mandate   || null,
  gate1_evidence:       d.gate1_evidence        || null,
  gate2_physical_ops:   d.gate2_physical_ops    || null,
  gate2_evidence:       d.gate2_evidence        || null,
  gate3_right_size:     d.gate3_right_size      || null,
  gate3_evidence:       d.gate3_evidence        || null,
  gate4_apac_deal_flow: d.gate4_apac_deal_flow  || null,
  gate4_evidence:       d.gate4_evidence        || null,
  aum_in_billions:      d.aum_in_billions       || null,
  phase1_confidence:    d.phase1_confidence     || null,
  scrape_quality:       d.scrape_quality        || null,
  run_date:             new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]
}}];
